keyFeatures.zh: 将图片调整为任何尺寸
压缩图片以加快加载速度

keyFeatures.en: Batch process multiple images at once
keyFeatures.zh: 一次批量处理多个图片

description.en: Up to 50 credits/month, no commercial use allowed
description.zh: 每月最多50积分，不允许商业使用

weaknesses.en: Limited to 50 credits/month, which may not be sufficient for businesses with higher image processing needs
weaknesses.zh: 每月仅限50积分，对于有较高图片处理需求的企业可能不够用

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses who need to resize and compress images for personal or small business use
targetAudience.zh: 需要调整和压缩图片进行个人或小型企业使用的个人和小企业

positioning.en: A simple and cost-effective solution for basic image resizing and compression needs
positioning.zh: 一个简单且经济实惠的基本图片调整和压缩需求解决方案
